title: Record abs110k, handoff 0.52, and 10k/300 tool budgets

fixtureActions.content:
# Abs110 Handoff52 Tool10k Contract

## Abs 110k
full compaction absolute soft trigger defaults to 110k tokens so long sessions reclaim earlier on large windows

## Handoff 52
UltraSwarm pre-handoff compaction targets 0.52 usage so swarm launches start with denser free headroom

## Tool 10k
tool-result budgets trim at 10k chars with 300-char previews for denser long-horizon context

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool vitest
